title: No Scrubs
why_this_song: No Scrubs by TLC (1999) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: A scrub is a guy that can't get no love from me
Hangin' out the passenger side of his best friend's ride
Oh yes son, I'm talking to you
If you live at home wit' your momma
Oh yes son, I'm talking to you
If you have a shorty that you don't show love

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "scrub" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "scrub" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And is, also known as a busta
No, don't want none of your time
No, I don't want no scrub

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Always talkin' about what he wants
If you live at home wit' your momma

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "No Scrubs" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "No Scrubs" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "No Scrubs", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "No Scrubs", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "No Scrubs" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "No Scrubs" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?
